task: Remove the glue stick from the open drawer and put it on the countertop
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - An open drawer contains a small orange object (glue stick) and a white sheet. The drawer is part of a white cabinet with a countertop above. The glue stick is a slender, cylindrical object with a distinct orange color, making it visually distinct from the white sheet. STRATEGY - First, reach into the drawer to grasp the glue stick. Then, transport it to the countertop and place it there. Failure modes include misgrasping the white sheet instead of the glue stick, or dropping the glue stick during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the drawer to locate the glue stick. Step 2: Grasp the glue stick by its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the glue stick to the countertop. Step 4: Place the glue stick on the countertop.
Goal: on(glue_stick, countertop)
Scene: glue_stick, drawer, countertop, cabinet
Step 1: reach(drawer)
  affordance_region: the open interior of the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: inside(gripper, drawer) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: inside(gripper, drawer)
Step 2: grasp(glue_stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange glue stick
  contact: holding(glue_stick) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(glue_stick)
Step 3: transport(glue_stick -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white countertop
  spatial: above(glue_stick, countertop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(glue_stick)
  done_when: above(glue_stick, countertop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(glue_stick -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white countertop
  contact: surface_contact(glue_stick, countertop) [completion]; released(glue_stick) [completion]
  pose: stable(glue_stick) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(glue_stick, countertop) AND released(glue_stick)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the open interior of the drawer
the body of the orange glue stick
an empty area on the white countertop
an empty area on the white countertop
